LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUN-09-2023 HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS INCUTECH, LLC., PIP, INC., AND SFRENT.NET, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 AT 9:30 A.M. ON JUNE 23, 2023. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL LANDLORD-TENANT/REAL PROPERTY CASES PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. BOTH SIDES ARE TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS TO THAT DEPARTMENT BY JUNE 12, 2023. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)
